# Apple News API Release Notes

**Article**

Learn about new features that require iOS 26, iPadOS 26, and macOS 26.

## Overview

These features were added in the latest Apple News API release:

- The [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsAPI/POST-channels-_channelId_-articles] endpoint throws a 400 error if you attempt to publish an article bundle exceeding 450 MB.
- The [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsAPI/POST-articles-_articleId_] endpoint throws a 400 error if you attempt to update an article bundle exceeding 450 MB.

These features were added in a previous Apple News API release:

- The [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsAPI/POST-channels-_channelId_-articles] endpoint throws a 400 error if you attempt to publish an article with a publication date before 1970, and a warning if the publication date is before 2015.
- The [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsAPI/POST-articles-_articleId_] endpoint throws a 400 error if you attempt to update an article with a publication date before 1970, and a warning if the publication date is before 2015.

This field is no longer supported in Apple News API:

- `accessoryText` is deprecated in [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsAPI/Create-Article-Metadata-Fields] and [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsAPI/Update-Article-Metadata-Fields]. Use the `authors` property in the Apple News Format [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Metadata] object instead.
